legend.note: Edit tiles[] to add objects. Each string is one row, left-to-right, exactly 50 chars.
legend.U: wall, top edge (90° rotation) — was 'T' before tables were added
legend.T: table — solid obstacle, place flush below the wall tile directly above it
legend.D: dinnertable — solid obstacle, player and vampire cannot pass through
legend.1: carpetcorner, 0° rotation (top-left corner) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.2: carpetmiddle, no rotation (center) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.3: carpettop, 0° rotation (top edge) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.4: carpetcorner, 90° rotation (top-right corner) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.5: carpetcorner, 180° rotation (bottom-right corner) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.6: carpetcorner, 270° rotation (bottom-left corner) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.7: carpettop, 90° rotation (right edge) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.8: carpettop, 180° rotation (bottom edge) — floor decoration, walkable
legend.9: carpettop, 270° rotation (left edge) — floor decoration, walkable
